title: Two teams formed in Salem to trace escaped life convict Mohammed Hussain
summary: Two special teams have been formed to trace life convict Mohammed Hussain who escaped from Salem Government Mohan Kumaramangalam Medical College Hospital while undergoing treatment for a piles-related ailment.

title: Convict broke window and climbed down drainage pipe to escape Salem hospital
summary: Investigators say convict Mohammed Hussain broke a window of the ward and climbed down a drainage pipe to escape from Salem Government Hospital. Two warders on duty have been suspended.

title: Search operations intensified in Salem, Thanjavur and Coimbatore
summary: Search operations have been intensified in Salem, Thanjavur and Coimbatore for the escaped life convict, who has more than 40 criminal cases pending against him. His wife is being questioned.

title: Salem Steel Plant divestment: SAIL agrees to give up 1,600 acres to TN
summary: SAIL has agreed in principle to give up 1,600 acres of Salem Steel Plant land to the Tamil Nadu government, paving the way for a planned technical textiles park in Salem.

title: CMRL submits feasibility report for new MRTS lines in Salem
summary: Chennai Metro Rail Limited has submitted the feasibility report for new MRTS lines in Salem. The report covers two corridors and an integrated multi-modal hub at the Salem junction.

title: SUEZ wins 25-year concession to provide water services to over 1 million in Salem
summary: SUEZ has won a 25-year concession to operate Salem's city-wide water distribution covering 91 sq km, including replacement of 1,800 km of ageing pipelines and 26 new service reservoirs.

title: Heavy rain in Salem; Mettur dam expected to touch FRL
summary: Heavy rainfall has disrupted normal life in Salem district, with the administration monitoring the Mettur dam which is expected to touch its Full Reservoir Level if rain continues.
